label: Ideo symbol part
description: Abstract base for ideology symbol defs. Provides meme and culture filter lists that control which ideologies can use the symbol.

memes.label: Memes
memes.description: MemeDefs that permit this symbol. When set, the symbol is only available to ideologies that contain at least one of the listed memes.

cultures.label: Cultures
cultures.description: CultureDefs that permit this symbol. When set, the symbol is only available to ideologies whose culture matches one of the listed cultures.
